name: Chicken Ultraburgers
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Boneless, skinless chicken (white and dark meat)
1 tbsp Olive oil with a dash of toasted sesame oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the chicken into small pieces.
2. Place onion, parsley leaves, parsley stalks, mustard, salt, and pepper in a food processor. Pulse until the onion is minced but not pureed.
3. Transfer the mixture to a large bowl and set aside.
4. Process the chicken (in 2 batches if necessary) for about 20 pulses.
5. Add the processed chicken to the bowl with the onion mixture.
6. Stir in the cooked brown rice until well mixed.
7. Form the mixture into 4 patties. Chilling the mixture for an hour makes forming easier.
8. Heat olive oil in a large skillet.
9. Cook the burgers 4 minutes on each side.
10. Serve on whole wheat buns with lettuce and tomato.
I made these a couple of nights ago... really flavorful! I didn't have any onion, but they still tasted fantastic. After deboning the chicken, I had lots of meat, which made about 6 patties.
